warnings: Ignored the instruction-only publication heading '请列举5篇左右代表性论文或著作。(Please list 5 representative publications)' as it did not list concrete items.
The professor's title is listed as '教授 Professor'. Using the Chinese canonical value '教授'.
The school and discipline are listed in both Chinese and English. Using the Chinese canonical values.

The academic service roles (e.g., '中国计算机学会高级会员') are listed but not mapped to experiences as they lack clear start/end dates or host organizations distinct from the association name. They are added as organizations.
The biography section contains text that is a duplicate of the education and work experience sections, so it is not extracted as separate biography_text.

The 'Members of - China Computer Federation, Chinese Association of Automation, China Association of Artificial Intelligence and IEEE' line is treated as a summary of the academic service list and used to populate organization names.
